metadata.description: Autonomous issue-to-PR agent runs, distributed as a single installable plugin.

plugins.name: bottega
plugins.description: /bottega:maestro is the whole pipeline: the orchestrator reads the codebase, agrees a spec with the user and commits it to the repo, puts costly decisions to a panel, builds with worker agents, has the integrated diff reviewed by both model families, and delivers a PR with QA evidence. The user appears twice: the spec OK and the merge; when the user says to run autonomously, the first is skipped. /bottega:spec stops at an agreed repo spec and tickets a later run picks up, and code-review, improve, panel, and setup are available on their own.
